name: Pexels Image Search
description: Search for high-quality stock photos using the Pexels API. Free for commercial use, no attribution required.

skill.name: pexels_images
skill.description: Search for high-quality stock photos using Pexels
skill.system_prompt:
You have access to Pexels image search tools for finding stock photos.

Usage tips:
- Use descriptive search queries: 'golden wheat field sunset' works better than 'wheat'
- For YouTube Shorts, always use orientation='portrait' to get 9:16 images
- Use the 'portrait' size URL (800x1200) for Shorts or 'original' for highest quality
- Results are sorted by relevance by default
- Pexels images are free for commercial use with no attribution required
- If no results are found for a specific query, try broader or simpler search terms
- You can search for videos too using search_videos

tools.name: search_images
tools.description: Search Pexels for stock photos. Returns up to 10 results with URLs in multiple sizes. Use orientation='portrait' for vertical/Shorts content.

query.description: Search query describing the image you want (e.g., 'golden wheat field sunset', 'dramatic ocean waves')

orientation.description: Image orientation: 'portrait' (vertical, best for Shorts), 'landscape' (horizontal), or 'square'. Default: 'portrait'

color.description: Filter by color: red, orange, yellow, green, turquoise, blue, violet, pink, brown, black, gray, white. Optional.

tools.name: search_videos
tools.description: Search Pexels for stock video clips. Useful for finding B-roll footage. Returns video URLs in multiple qualities.

query.description: Search query describing the video you want
